## Description
[](https://github.com/SoLoR1)
[SoLoR1](https://github.com/SoLoR1)
opened [on Mar 13, 2026](https://github.com/Tautulli/Tautulli/issues/2648#issue-4069886541)
### Is your feature request related to a problem?
*No response*
### What is your feature request?
I would want option to exclude my Live TV channels from most watched/popular movie list. Because it makes a mess.
I have set up my plex live tv over threadfin, so i can stream my providers IPTV channels. This is bunch of various TV & radio channels most of them have EPG. Now it messes up a list. For example:
[](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/3218757/562901222-978b1053-b3f6-495e-a3cc-e4a5ebfd4e97.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..B3XApBYl6Ume2905m9ypG1EEbRWKdI8DapadrDDbyu8)
"Matjaž Lovše" is radio show. Yes this is currently only one, since i was just testing it, however im afraid list will become a mess :)
### Are there any workarounds?
*No response*

*No response*
